reasoning: The PCI DSS control 1.2.6 focuses on ensuring that network access is restricted and not publicly accessible, similar to cloud security group and NACL configurations. In Kubernetes, this can be mapped to NetworkPolicies that enforce default deny rules for ingress and egress traffic, ensuring that only explicitly allowed traffic is permitted. Additionally, restricting the use of LoadBalancer services and ensuring TLS is enabled for Ingress resources further aligns with the control's intent to prevent unauthorized public access.
title: Requirement 1.2.6
